Parameter.name: temperature0
Parameter.shortDescription: Temperature in Degrees C of on enclosure by burn wire deployment mechanism

Parameter.name: temperature1
Parameter.shortDescription: Temperature in Degrees C of on enclosure by mounting bracket

Parameter.name: streamQueuePercent
Parameter.shortDescription: Data in stream out queue needing to be sent

Parameter.name: storeForwardCount
Parameter.shortDescription: The count of store and forward data packets sent

Parameter.name: storeErrCount
Parameter.shortDescription: The count of store and forward data packets ERRORS

Parameter.name: rover_voltage
Parameter.shortDescription: Raw ADC counts of measured voltage

Parameter.name: launchLock_voltage
Parameter.shortDescription: Raw ADC counts of measured voltage

Parameter.name: heater_voltage
Parameter.shortDescription: Raw ADC counts of measured voltage

Parameter.name: hasUHFPing
Parameter.shortDescription: 0 = No pings from Yaoki over UHF, 1 = pings from Yaoki over UHF

Parameter.name: forwardCmdCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Count of commands that are successfully forwarded to Yaoki

Parameter.name: fwdCmdErrCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Count of commands that are NOT successfully forwarded to Yaoki

Parameter.name: cmdCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Count of commands to PLD.YAOKI App

Parameter.name: commandQueue
Parameter.shortDescription: TBD (Status of the YAOKI command queue in IM ground segement?)

Parameter.name: Accelerometer_X
Parameter.LongDescription: Raw accelerometer data, X-axis, directly read from the i2c bus. no casting no scaling meant to be sent at the highest possible frequency

Parameter.name: Accelerometer_Y
Parameter.LongDescription: Raw accelerometer data, Y-axis, directly read from the i2c bus. no casting no scaling meant to be sent at the highest possible frequency

Parameter.name: Accelerometer_Z
Parameter.LongDescription: Raw accelerometer data, Z-axis, directly read from the i2c bus. no casting no scaling meant to be sent at the highest possible frequency

Parameter.name: Status
Parameter.shortDescription: Raw status. Prefer to use the split status parameters instead

Parameter.name: VBAT_CHECK
Parameter.shortDescription: Yaoki power source: 0 if on lander power / 1 if on internal battery power
Parameter.LongDescription: l.204: boolean that returns 0 if using power from the lander and 1 if using the internal Yaoki battery GPIO measurement that confirms that the command "bat":"1" was successfully executed (DC_Relay_ON())

Parameter.name: last_rssi
Parameter.shortDescription: Last received RSSI value from the lander-rover UHF radio link

Parameter.name: accelerometer_x
Parameter.LongDescription: Accelerometer data, x-axis, scaled and casted to float.

Parameter.name: accelerometer_y
Parameter.LongDescription: Accelerometer data, y-axis, scaled and casted to float.

Parameter.name: accelerometer_z
Parameter.LongDescription: Accelerometer data, z-axis, scaled and casted to float.

Parameter.name: Tx_cnt
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of sent telemetry packet sets
Parameter.LongDescription: Simple counter that increments at each 'Send TLM' time allocation (~30 seconds) (the two telemetry packet sent at the same time are only counted as one) Min value: 0 Max value: 98 (then resets to 0)

Parameter.name: CamSent_cnt
Parameter.LongDescription: Simple counter that increments by 1 for every 960 camera packet sent (corresponds to each camera image). This same counter is used in the CSP header of the camera packets. Min value: 0 Max value: 99 (then resets to 0)

Parameter.name: Rx_cnt
Parameter.LongDescription: Simple counter that increments for each valid command received Commands are considered valid if more than 5 key/value pairs in the JSON string. The nominal number is 7. Note: if the command has between 1 and 5 key/value pairs, the command is still processed (!) but Rx_cnt is not incremented (!!) Note: pings are not commands. Min value: 0 Max value: 98 (then resets to 0)

Parameter.name: RxError_cnt
Parameter.LongDescription: Simple counter that increments for each command received that is considered eroneous (and therefore not processed). The error criteria is if the command has zero key/value pairs in the JSON string. Min value: 0 Max value: 98 (then resets to 0)

Parameter.name: Status_TLM
Parameter.shortDescription: Raw status telemetry. Prefer to use the split status parameters instead

Parameter.name: Status_BAT
Status_ICUT
Parameter.shortDescription: The deployment wire is currently being cut
Parameter.LongDescription: Indicates that the wire is being cut by the activation of the Heater Relay for a set number of seconds. The nominal sequence of this status is cleared -> set (with command {"cut": "1"}) -> cleared (after the set number of seconds) l.718: Cleared if isCut!= 1 l.810: Cleared similarly (first case is if isCamData == 1. / Second case is if isCamData == 0) l.836: Set if isCut == 1 and cut_cnt == 0. Note: then blocks to send the high frequency accelerometer data TxGsenData_CutDrop() l.853: Cleared if (cut_cnt > cut_time). Note: then Heater_Relay_OFF() and Sets STATUS_WASCUT

Parameter.name: Status_CAM
Parameter.shortDescription: The camera is actively taking the picture / sending the data via CSP

Parameter.name: Status_MOVE
Parameter.shortDescription: The rover should be moving (e.g time remains since the last move command set the move timer
Parameter.LongDescription: l.685: Cleared if isMove != 1. which should mean "and get Stop motor command while moving , or No commands while being stay" l.777: Cleared similarly (first case is if isCamData == 1 / Second case is if isCamData == 0) l.925: Set if isMove==1 AND Move_cnt == 0 l.944: Cleared if (Move_cnt > Move_time). Note: at the same time as BLDC_1_OFF() and BLDC_2_OFF()

Parameter.name: Status_NORX
Parameter.LongDescription: l.415: Set if (NoRx_cnt > NORX_LIMIT) Note: at the same time, the two motors are commanded forward for 30ms. Then the counter resets l.603: Cleared if ping is received. l.626: Cleared if a command is received.

Parameter.name: Status_WCUT
Parameter.shortDescription: The command to cut the wire was sent AND the time allocated for the wire cut heater has ellapsed
Parameter.LongDescription: l.854: Set if (cut_cnt > cut_time). Note: at the same time as Heater_Relay_OFF() and STATUS_WIRECUT is cleared (never cleared)

Parameter.name: last_packet_num
Parameter.shortDescription: Last packet number of the current image

Parameter.name: missing_packet_cnt
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of packets missing from the current image

CustomAlgorithm.name: status_split
